envelope.subject: 🍴 You're Invited! Join Our Special Tasting Event

opens.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 5.1; rv:11.0) Gecko Firefox/11.0 (via ggpht.com GoogleImageProxy)

subject: 🍴 You're Invited! Join Our Special Tasting Event
body_text:
Hey Gabriella,

  

We’re excited to invite you to a special tasting experience — the perfect
chance to explore our menu and find the best options for your event!

  
📅 **Date:** Saturday, July 26, **2025**  
📍 **Venue:** 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420  
⏰ **Time Slots:** 1:30 PM & 5:30 PM  
  
**Let me know what time works for you to join us.**

  
The last tasting we had was a blast, and we can't wait to bring that same
energy to our next tasting. Check out some photos taken from our last
tasting!![Untitled design.jpg](cid:218d-536e-bf9c)  
  
  

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,

**Andre Raw**  
 _​​_ Catering Event Coordinator

📲 C: [(978) 235-3791](tel:19782353791)

📲 W: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)  
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/comeketocatering) | [Instagram](https://instagram.com/comeketocatering) | [Website](https://comeketocatering.com/)
